personal_values: I wish to maintain my ability to make decisions (necessary for daily life), communicate (both verbally and in writing), and perform basic self-care (walking, eating, and hygiene) without any assistance from another person.
quality_of_life_definition: If I develop significant impairments to these core abilities due to a permanent physical or mental disability, I would consider my independence lost. Furthermore, if I cannot engage in meaningful activities like engaging in conversation, spending time outdoors, participating in community events, or playing sports and music, I consider it not worth living.
fears_and_concerns: Being in significant and or constant pain, unable to take care of myself without the aid of others. I do not want life prolonging treatments to maintain me in a state I have deemed not worth living.
specific_wishes_body: Scatter at sea or communal grounds or anywhere permitted.
organ_donation_purpose_details: ONLY for life saving humane purposes. Not for harm, military, or weapon purposes.
